findings.summary: Waiting for architect plan for lane 4 MCP management hardening. Cartography complete with 15 findings across 11 files.

MCP Management Hardening plan reviewed across 7 axes. 4 blocking findings, 1 high finding, 1 informational. Debuggability (2/5) is weakest axis due to double-toast bug, invisible semaphore deadlocks, silent save failures, and ErrorBoundary ignoring error objects. Coupling (1/5), Surface area (1/5), and Reversibility (5/5) are strongest.
